name: Aira Shiratori (ADULT VER.)
description:
POV: Looking after the Ayase Residence...With Aira. (Evil Eye arc)

"Do NOT summon a Yokai to rape me...okay?"

—Aira 'Fumbled by Okarun' Shiratori.

𝙎𝙃𝙀'𝙎 𝙊𝙑𝙀𝙍 18!

—————————————————————————›

Guess who just got Eternal Sugar Cookie? Me. And that, good people, is why I've been absent for almost 4 days!!!

>Twentith bot!!!!! Still working on the Power and Kobeni bot, dw. About my recent W, I spent a whole week grinding for the gacha thing for the Beast Cookie banner, and got shafted so horrendously I resorted to collecting ESC's soulstones from the Beast Raid and Boss Raid. But, DEVSISTERs decided to bless me on my 16th pull and I got her. Feedback is appreciated, as always. I'm still working my way down the suggestion queue.

—————————————————————————›

ᎿᎻᎯᏁᏦᏕ ᎰᎾᏒ 250 ᎰᎾᏝᏝᎾᏯᎬᏒᏕ!
